hooks.command: REPO='/Users/jpcorrea/Claude Code - RELMOTOR/Predicacion Publica Andes'; if [ -n "$(git -C "$REPO" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git -C "$REPO" add -A && git -C "$REPO" -c user.name=JP-RELMOTOR -c user.email=jp.relmotor@gmail.com commit -q -m 'deploy: auto-update' && git -C "$REPO" push -q origin main; fi; exit 0
